totalDriverEarnings.description: Sum of all driver earnings across all completed rides

totalPlatformCommission.description: Total commission collected by the platform from float-based rides

totalSubscriptionRevenue.description: Total revenue from driver subscription purchases

totalFloatSold.description: Cumulative float purchased by all drivers (platform cash in)

totalActiveFloat.description: Sum of all positive float balances currently held

totalNegativeFloat.description: Absolute sum of all negative float balances (debt owed to platform)

driversWithNegativeFloat.description: Number of drivers currently in negative float

totalWithdrawalsProcessed.description: Total amount paid out via withdrawals

totalPendingWithdrawals.description: Total amount currently awaiting withdrawal processing

totalSubscriptionRides.description: Rides completed with zero commission (subscription riders)

totalFloatRides.description: Rides completed with float commission deduction
